title: Sensitive-Spark / CubeSpec — Monte-Carlo, DOE and Sobol sensitivity for the 150 mm concrete cube test
description: An interactive web dashboard (TypeScript + React) and a Python package (cubespec) implementing Monte-Carlo simulation, full and fractional factorial Design of Experiments, Response-Surface Methodology, Sobol sensitivity indices, and FORM reliability analysis for the 150x150x150 mm concrete cube compressive-strength test. Developed as an undergraduate engineering thesis with bilingual (EN/GR) documentation, calibrated Poly2-ridge surrogate (R^2 ~ 0.97), and full reproducibility (Docker, Binder, hypothesis property tests, mutation-testing CI).
